snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为经典剪接位点突变。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant may cause abnormal splicing. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000008278(1/120806) in the ExAC database, with no record in the 1000G, gnomAD or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=126832) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: two stars) and Oncogenic in somatic classification (review status: one star).This variant has been reported in two patients with retinoblastoma (PMID: 27582626, PMID: 26396485).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant may cause abnormal splicing. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000008278(1/120806) in the ExAC database, with no record in the 1000G, gnomAD or iJGVD databases(data in the ExAC database fail the filter); the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant.
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the canonical splice sites of the gene.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能造成异常剪接。该变异在ExAC数据库NFE人群等位基因频率为0.00001503（1/66536），1000G、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能造成异常剪接。该变异在ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率为0.000008278（1/120806），1000G、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=126832）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为两颗星），体系突变分类为Oncogenic（可靠度为一颗星）。在2例视网膜母细胞瘤患者中报道该变异（PMID: 27582626, PMID: 26396485）。
snvindel.gene_function: RB1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白在细胞内主要负责细胞周期检查点的调节，其激活状态可以抑制G1期至S期的转换（PMID: 1655277）；此外，RB1蛋白在维护基因组稳定性、介导细胞凋亡等活动中起着重要作用。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心II期临床试验（NCT02038647, PMID: 31655296），旨在评估Alisertib（MLN8237）联合紫杉醇与安慰剂联合紫杉醇用于二线治疗小细胞肺癌（SCLC）的疗效及安全性。研究发现，在140例携带基因变异的患者中，携带细胞周期调节相关的基因（CDK6、RBL1、RBL2、RB1）变异的患者使用Alisertib+紫杉醇治疗对比使用安慰剂+紫杉醇治疗的患者中位PFS分别为3.68个月、1.80个月（HR=0.395, 95% CI: 0.239–0.654），中位OS分别为7.20个月、4.47个月（HR=0.427, 95% CI: 0.259–0.704）。此外，c-Myc蛋白表达患者的亚组分析显示，共有46个肿瘤组织样本通过免疫组织化学分析可评估c-Myc表达，33例（72%）c-Myc表达阳性(IHC：1+、2+或3+)，13例（28%）c-Myc表达阴性。在c-Myc阳性患者中，Alisertib+紫杉醇组（n=17）的中位PFS为4.64个月，而安慰剂+紫杉醇组（n=16）的中位PFS为2.27个月（HR=0.29, 95% CI: 0.12-0.72）。在c-Myc阴性患者中，Alisertib+紫杉醇组（n=6）的中位PFS为3.32个月，而安慰剂+紫杉醇组（n=7）的中位PFS为5.16个月(HR=11.8, 95% CI: 1.52-91.2)。研究结果显示，c-Myc表达与PFS的改善密切相关。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 26826116），RB1缺陷的小细胞肺癌的小鼠移植瘤模型，对CDK4/6抑制剂Trilaciclib（G1T28）单药处理耐药，拓扑替康可强力抑制移植瘤的生长，而与Trilaciclib联用可显著增强这一抑制作用。

snvindel.gene_function_en: RB1, retinoblastoma-associated protein, is a key negative regulator of the G1 to S transition during cell division (PMID: 15084261) and also plays a role in cell differentiation, survival, senescence, epigenetic regulation, and genome stability (PMID: 21295686, PMID: 23359405, PMID: 22293180). Inactivation of Rb1 and loss of Rb1 tumor suppressor function has been identified in many early stage cancers (PMID: 26160835).

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第301位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺并于344位发生终止。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. This variant is not recorded in the gnomAD database in non-founder effect populations; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=233908) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: two stars). The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactivated proteins. This variant is not recorded in the gnomAD database in non-founder effect populations; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 61 times of amino acid change at the TP53 protein position 301, of which the mutant P301Qfs*44 is recorded 36 times. The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant.
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Proline with Glutamine at position 301 and causes termination of the protein at codon 344.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomAD数据库非始祖效应人群中无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录61次TP53蛋白第301位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P301Qfs*44记录36次。Cancer Hotspots数据库无记录。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomAD数据库非始祖效应人群中无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=233908）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为两颗星）。Cancer Hotspots数据库无记录。
snvindel.gene_function: TP53基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），编码蛋白参与细胞周期停滞和凋亡，是肿瘤中最常发生突变的基因（PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868）。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项II期、开放标签、非随机研究（NCT01164995, PMID: 37236033），入组32名中位年龄为63岁（39–77岁）的TP53突变PROC（抗铂性卵巢癌）患者，使用卡铂AUC 5 mg/ml·min静脉注射和阿达沃司替布（Adavosertib）225 mg BID口服，为期2.5天，周期21天；主要目的是确定卡铂和阿达沃司替布的疗效和安全性。次要目标包括无进展生存期（PFS）、循环肿瘤细胞（CTC）变化等。研究结果显示，在29名可疗效评估的患者中，12名患者部分缓解（PR），客观ORR为41%（95% CI:23%-61%），中位PFS为5.6个月（95% CI:3.8-10.3）。研究认为：阿达沃司替布225 mg BID 2.5天和卡铂AUC 5联合使用是安全的，并在PROC患者中显示出抗肿瘤疗效。

一项多中心II期临床试验（NCT01357161, PMID: 32611648），试验分为2个部分，第一部分为开放标签的安全性试验，第二部分为随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的临床试验；总共入组121位TP53突变的铂敏感的卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者，分别使用Adavosertib(AZD1775)+卡铂+紫杉醇或安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇治疗。主要研究终点为ePFS（RECIST v1.1加强版评估的PFS）和安全性。研究结果：PFS对比中，Adavosertib+卡铂+紫杉醇 vs 安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇为7.9个月 vs 7.3个月（HR 0.63[95% CI 0.38-1.06];two-side P=0.080），满足预设的显著性阈值（P＜0.2）。

一项II期临床试验（NCT03588078, PMID: 33600210），入组52例携带TP53突变的患者，包括34例骨髓异常增长综合征患者（MDS）、18例急性髓系白血病患者（AML，包括7名骨髓母细胞超过30%的患者），使用APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷进行治疗；主要终点为缓解率，次要终点为安全性、总生存期等参数。研究结果显示，MDS患者的总体缓解率为62%，包括47%的完全缓解率，中位缓解持续时间为10.4个月；AML患者的总体缓解率为33%，包括17%的完全缓解率（在骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的急性髓系白血病中，总缓解率分别为27%、0%）。中位随访时间为9.7个月，MDS的中位OS为12.1个月，骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的AML的中位OS分别为13.9和3.0个月。研究结论为：在极高危TP53m MDS和AML患者群体中，APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷是安全的，并显示出比单独使用阿扎胞苷更高的缓解率，以及更长的总生存期。

一项I期临床试验（NCT01339871, PMID: 25669829），旨在探究培唑帕尼（Pazopanib）联合伏立诺他（Vorinostat）在晚期实体瘤患者中的最高耐受剂量和安全性。共纳入78例患者（肉瘤：n=23，结直肠癌：n=14，黑色素瘤：n=7，卵巢癌：n=5，肾细胞癌：n=4；肝癌：n=3，非小细胞肺癌：n=3，其他：n=19），接受11个剂量水平的联合治疗，结果表明：15例（19%）患者具有临床获益（PR：n=4，SD≥6个月：n=11），78例患者的中位PFS和中位OS分别为2.2个月、8.9个月；使用Cox回归模型确定临床获益的多变量分析中显示TP53突变状态与临床获益有关，36例患者接受了TP53突变检测，与TP53野生型的患者（n=25）相比，TP53突变型患者（n=11）的临床获益率更高（45% vs 16%）、中位PFS更长（3.5个月 vs 2.0个月）、中位OS更长（12.7个月 vs 7.4个月），从联合治疗中获益的TP53突变型患者为：携带TP53 R213*、G245S的结直肠癌患者，携带TP53 R175H、DBDdel、H193R的肉瘤患者。所有患者中未出现与治疗相关的死亡事件，推荐的II期剂量为培唑帕尼（600 mg/天）联合伏立诺他（300 mg/天）。

一项I期、开放标签、非随机三组剂量递增的临床试验中（NCT00648648，PMID: 27601554），入组202名晚期实体瘤患者，组1（n=9）先接受单剂量Adavosertib/AZD1775（观察14天，8人加入组2A），组2接受单剂量Adavosertib（组2A，n=43）或每日两次五倍剂量/每日一次双倍剂量（组2B，n=158）联合一种化疗（吉西他滨、顺铂或卡铂）。研究结果显示，在176名可评估疗效的患者中，94名（53%）患者病情稳定，17名（10%）患者达到部分缓解；TP53突变患者（n=19）中4名达到部分缓解（PR），应答率为21%，而TP53野生型患者（n=33）为12%。研究结论为，Adavosertib单剂联合化疗安全、耐受性好；TP53突变患者的应答率更高一些，但仍需扩大样本量进一步评估。

snvindel.gene_function_en: TP53, cellular tumor antigen p53, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell cycle arrest and apoptosis, and is the most frequently mutated gene in cancer (PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868). TP53 germline mutations are common in Li-Fraumeni syndrome (PMID: 30239254) and somatic missense mutations are frequent in almost all cancer types cancers (PMID: 30224644) and are also implicated in chemoresistance (PMID: 9927204, PMID: 24065105, PMID: 27066457).

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第739位氨基酸由酪氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the ClinVar database has no record about this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 739th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Tyrosine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RASA1基因属于抑癌基因，它是一种RAS-GTP激活蛋白（RasGAP），它促进RAS-GTP水解以调节RAS通路信号，并在细胞增殖、迁移、凋亡和血管生成中发挥作用（PMID: 19022332;PMID: 29127119）。在非小细胞肺癌（PMID: 29127119）中发现RASA1与NF1共突变，在转移性黑色素瘤中发现RASA1表达降低和RASA1突变（PMID: 26993606）。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RASA1 (Ras p21 protein activator 1) encodes a RAS GAP also known as p120RasGAP (PMID: 3201259). It accelerates the conversion of Ras-GTP to Ras-GDP to terminate Ras signaling (PMID: 17540168, 18568040). The absence of RASA1 activity leads to accumulation of GTP-bound RAS and persistent MAP kinase signaling following growth factor stimulation (PMID: 9121432). Somatic alterations in RASA1 map to all regions of the gene, including the C-terminal GAP catalytic domain and the N-terminal tandem SH2-SH3-SH2-PH-C2 domains. The SH2 and SH3 domains have been shown to interact with signaling proteins, including RhoGaps. Statistical analysis of mutational profiles of more than 8,200 tumor data sets identified RASA1 as a candidate driver and a putative tumor-suppressor gene based on a high ratio of inactivating to benign mutations (PMID: 24183448). RASA1 has also been implicated as a potential tumor suppressor in aggressive cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and several subtypes of breast cancer (PMID: 25303977, 16570289, 19372580). The highest rates of RASA1 mutations have been reported for prostate adenocarcinoma (13.1%) and cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (13%) (PMID: 22722839, 25303977). In most cancers somatic alterations in RASA1 are infrequent (e.g. 1.6% across 21 tumor types) (PMID: 24390350). RASA1 plays an essential role in vascular system development, as loss-of-function mutations cause capillary ‘malformation-arteriovenous’ malformation syndrome (CM-AVM) (PMID: 24038909, 22913934).

cnv.variant_interpret_en: According to The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) records, AURKA amplification has an occurrence rate of over 2% in tumors such as colorectal adenocarcinoma, serous ovarian cystadenocarcinoma, invasive breast carcinoma, esophageal adenocarcinoma, and uterine carcinosarcoma. Some studies have shown (PMID: 29675108) that AURKA gene copy number increase is a poor prognostic factor for patients with acral melanoma. Another study (PMID: 20585902) showed that AURKA gene copy number increase was positively correlated with tumor progression and mRNA overexpression in gastric cancer patients. The OncoKB database records AURKA gene amplification as Oncogenic.
cnv.variant_interpret_cn: 根据TCGA数据库记录，AURKA扩增在结直肠腺癌​、浆液性卵巢囊腺癌、浸润性乳腺癌、食管腺癌、​子宫肉瘤​等肿瘤中有2%以上的发生率。有研究表明（PMID: 29675108），AURKA基因拷贝数增加是肢端黑色素瘤患者的不良预后因素；另有研究表明（PMID: 20585902），AURKA基因拷贝数增加与胃癌患者的肿瘤进展及mRNA过表达呈正相关性。OncoKB数据库记录AURKA基因扩增为Oncogenic。
cnv.gene_function: AURKA基因属于原癌基因，是Aurora丝氨酸-苏氨酸激酶家族的一部分，在有丝分裂中起作用（PMID: 22864622）。 已经在包括乳腺癌在内的多种实体瘤类型中鉴定出Aurka的扩增和过表达（PMID: 22825030）。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。

cnv.gene_function_en: AURKA, Aurora kinase A, is part of the aurora serine-threonine kinase family and plays a role in mitosis (PMID: 22864622). Amplification and overexpression of Aurka has been identified in a variety of solid tumor types, including breast cancer (PMID: 22825030).

cnv.variant_interpret_en: The My Cancer Genome database records that approximately 0.11% of patients have NTRK3 gene amplification, among which invasive ductal carcinoma of the breast, invasive breast cancer, cutaneous melanoma, high-grade serous adenocarcinoma of the ovary, and acrofacial melanoma are the most common. It has been reported in the literature (PMID: 28746220) that copy number variations of the NTRK3 gene are associated with platinum sensitivity and platinum-resistant recurrence, and NTRK3 gene amplification can predict platinum-sensitive recurrence in patients with ovarian cancer.
cnv.variant_interpret_cn: My Cancer Genome数据库记录，约0.11%的患者存在NTRK3基因扩增，其中以乳腺浸润性导管癌、浸润性乳腺癌、皮肤黑色素瘤、卵巢高级别浆液性腺癌和肢端黑色素瘤最为常见。有文献报道（PMID: 28746220），NTRK3基因拷贝数变异与铂敏感和铂耐药复发相关，NTRK3基因扩增可预测卵巢癌患者的铂敏感性复发。
cnv.gene_function: NTRK3（神经营养受体酪氨酸激酶3）是一种膜受体酪氨酸激酶，当与神经营养因子结合时，可启动信号级联，导致细胞生长和分化（PMID: 23396845），当无配体时，可诱导细胞凋亡（PMID: 23396845）。Ntrk3在促纤维性小圆细胞肿瘤（PMID: 33229458）中被发现过表达，ETV6-NTRK3融合常见于分泌性乳腺癌、肾梭形细胞肿瘤（PMID: 31075511）。
cnv.gene_function_en: NTRK3, neurotrophic receptor tyrosine kinase 3, is a membrane receptor tyrosine kinase that initiates signaling cascades leading to cell growth and differentiation when binds to neurotrophins (PMID: 23396845), and induces apoptosis when ligand-free (PMID: 23396845). Overexpression of Ntrk3 has been identified in desmoplastic small round cell tumors (PMID: 33229458) and ETV6-NTRK3 fusions are commonly observed in secretory breast carcinomas, spindle cell tumors of the kidney (PMID: 31075511).

cnv.variant_interpret_cn: 有研究发现（PMID: 28316110），乳腺癌中有PSMD4扩增和过表达，且其过表达与预后较差相关；敲减PSMD4导致细胞生长显著降低；在PSMD4扩增乳腺癌细胞系中敲减PSMD4或PSMD4扩增丢失可导致PAPR1蛋白敲减，PSMD4拷贝数增加或扩增的乳腺癌细胞系对他拉唑帕利的敏感性显著更高，提示其可能可以预测PARP抑制剂的敏感性。
cnv.gene_function: PSMD4，蛋白酶体26S亚基，非ATPase 4，26S蛋白酶体是一种多催化蛋白酶复合物。PSMD4是26S蛋白酶体的主要受体，参与泛素依赖性和蛋白酶体介导的蛋白质降解。PSMD4沉默可阻止细胞增殖和肿瘤生长，诱导细胞凋亡并抑制蛋白酶体活性。抑制PSMD4可阻止肝细胞癌的发生（PMID: 30930224）。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项细胞实验中（PMID: 28316110），相比于拷贝数没有改变的细胞系，PSMD4拷贝数增加/扩增的乳腺癌细胞系对他拉唑帕利敏感性显著更高。

cnv.variant_interpret_en: The My Cancer Genome database records that approximately 0.50% of patients have IGF1R gene amplification, among which invasive ductal carcinoma of the breast, invasive breast cancer, cutaneous melanoma, high-grade serous adenocarcinoma of the ovary, and lung adenocarcinoma are the most common. Studies have shown (PMID: 28382840) that the amplification of the IGF1R gene is related to the parenchymal lesion of pleuropulmonary blastoma and may be a late event of tumor progression.
cnv.variant_interpret_cn: My Cancer Genome数据库记录，约0.50%的患者存在IGF1R基因扩增，其中以乳腺浸润性导管癌、浸润性乳腺癌、皮肤黑色素瘤、卵巢高级别浆液性腺癌及肺腺癌最为常见。有研究表明（PMID: 28382840），IGF1R基因扩增与胸膜肺母细胞瘤实质病变有关，可能是肿瘤进展的晚期事件。
cnv.gene_function: IGF1R基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白一种受体酪氨酸激酶，可激活MAPK、PI3K/AKT和JAK/STAT通路，从而促进细胞增殖（PMID: 22520978）。IGF1R基因过表达在多种肿瘤中被观察到，其中包括了浸润性膀胱癌（PMID: 30338346）。
cnv.gene_function_en: IGF1R, insulin-like growth factor 1 receptor, is a receptor tyrosine kinase which activates MAPK, PI3K/AKT, and JAK/STAT pathways, promoting cell proliferation (PMID: 22520978). Overexpression of Igf1r has been observed in various tumors, including invasive bladder carcinoma (PMID: 30338346).

msi.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。
msi.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿扎胞苷为胞苷的嘧啶核苷类似物，具有抗肿瘤活性。 阿扎胞苷被掺入 DNA 中，它可逆地抑制 DNA 甲基转移酶，从而阻断 DNA 甲基化。 阿扎胞苷对 DNA 的低甲基化可能会激活因高甲基化而沉默的肿瘤抑制基因，从而产生抗肿瘤作用。 该试剂还掺入 RNA，从而破坏正常的 RNA 功能并削弱 tRNA 胞嘧啶-5-甲基转移酶活性。
adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准艾伏尼布联合阿扎胞苷用于IDH1突变，新诊断≥75岁或因并发症无法使用强烈诱导化疗AML患者的治疗。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: 伏立诺他可通过nM级别的浓度（IC50＜86nM）抑制I型组蛋白去乙酰酶IHDAC1/HDAC2/HDAC3和II型的HDAC6的酶活。这些酶能够去除包括组蛋白和转录因子等蛋白中赖氨酸残疾上的乙酰基团。在一些肿瘤中，过表达HDAC或招募至转录因子的HDAC水平异常可导致核小体组蛋白低乙酰化，组蛋白低乙酰化与染色质结构压缩和基因转录受抑制相关。抑制HDAC活性可使乙酰基团在组蛋白赖氨酸残基中积累以便有开放的染色质结构和正常的转录活性。在体外实验中，伏立诺地证实可导致一些转化细胞中的乙酰化的组蛋白积累并诱导细胞周期阻滞和/或凋亡。

紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。

drug.drug_mechanism_cn: Pazopanib（帕唑帕尼）是一种多酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2，VEGFR-3，血小板衍生生长因子受体（PDGFR）-α和-β，成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR） -1和-3，细胞因子受体（Kit），白介素2受体诱导的T细胞激酶（Itk），淋巴细胞特异性蛋白酪氨酸激酶（Lck）和跨膜糖蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（c-Fms）。 在体外，Pazopanib抑制配体诱导的VEGFR-2，Kit和PDGFR-β受体的自磷酸化。 在体内，Pazopanib抑制小鼠肺中VEGF诱导的VEGFR-2磷酸化，小鼠模型中的血管生成以及小鼠中某些人肿瘤异种移植物的生长。

io_gene_clinical.evidence: 有研究表明，p53可通过miR-34调节PD-L1表达（PMID:26577528）。一项对公共数据库中肺腺癌患者的基因组、转录组、蛋白质组及临床数据的整合分析的研究中发现，TP53突变能显著提高免疫检查点的表达并激活T细胞效应因子和γ干扰素；TP53/KRAS共突变可提高PD-L1表达，且共突变组总具有最高的PD-L1+/CD8A+比例；进一步研究发现TP53或KRAS突变可导致一些列与细胞周期调节、DNA复制和DNA损伤修复相关的基因的改变。对公开的临床试验及真实临床数据的回顾分析进一步确认，TP53或KRAS突变的患者，尤其是TP53/KRAS共突变的患者，用PD-1抑制剂治疗具有显著的临床获益（PMID:28039262）。一项对31例接受pembrolizumab治疗的非小细胞肺癌患者的回顾性分析显示，TP53突变(STK11及EGFR野生型)的肺腺癌患者接受抗PD-1治疗后其无进展生存期更长(P＜0.001) （PMID:29764856）。
io_gene_clinical.test_significance: TP53突变可能为免疫治疗正向预测因子。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A second-generation, orally bioavailable, highly selective small molecule inhibitor of the serine/threonine protein kinase Aurora A kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Alisertib binds to and inhibits Aurora A kinase, which may result in disruption of the assembly of the mitotic spindle apparatus, disruption of chromosome segregation, and inhibition of cell proliferation. Aurora A kinase localizes to the spindle poles and to spindle microtubules during mitosis, and is thought to regulate spindle assembly. Aberrant expression of Aurora kinases occurs in a wide variety of cancers, including colon and breast cancers.

Tozasertib (VX-680, MK-0457) is a pan-Aurora inhibitor, mostly against Aurora A with Kiapp of 0.6 nM in a cell-free assay, less potent towards Aurora B/Aurora C and 100-fold more selective for Aurora A than 55 other kinases. The only exceptions are Fms-related tyrosine kinase-3 (FLT-3) and BCR-ABL tyrosine kinase, which are inhibited by the Tozasertib with both Ki of 30 nM. Tozasertib induces apoptosis and autophagy.

A methylated derivative and structural analog of PRIMA-1 (p53 re-activation and induction of massive apoptosis), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, PRIMA-1 analog APR-246 covalently modifies the core domain of mutated forms of cellular tumor antigen p53 (p53) through the alkylation of thiol groups. These modifications restore both the wild-type conformation and function to mutant p53, which reconstitutes endogenous p53 activity, leading to cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in tumor cells. This agent may work synergistically with other antineoplastic agents. p53, a tumor suppressor and transcription factor normally activated upon DNA damage, is frequently mutated and overexpressed in cancer cells; it plays a key role in both DNA repair and the induction of apoptosis.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿扎胞苷为胞苷的嘧啶核苷类似物，具有抗肿瘤活性。 阿扎胞苷被掺入 DNA 中，它可逆地抑制 DNA 甲基转移酶，从而阻断 DNA 甲基化。 阿扎胞苷对 DNA 的低甲基化可能会激活因高甲基化而沉默的肿瘤抑制基因，从而产生抗肿瘤作用。 该试剂还掺入 RNA，从而破坏正常的 RNA 功能并削弱 tRNA 胞嘧啶-5-甲基转移酶活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A pyrimidine nucleoside analogue of cytidine with antineoplastic activity. Azacitidine is incorporated into DNA, where it reversibly inhibits DNA methyltransferase, thereby blocking DNA methylation.  Hypomethylation of DNA by azacitidine may activate tumor suppressor genes silenced by hypermethylation, resulting in an antitumor effect. This agent is also incorporated into RNA, thereby disrupting normal RNA function and impairing tRNA cytosine-5-methyltransferase activity. (NCI04)

A small molecule, competitive inhibitor of cyclin dependent kinases 4 and 6 (CDK4/6), with potential antineoplastic and chemoprotective activities. Upon intravenous administration, trilaciclib binds to and inhibits the activity of CDK4/6, thereby blocking the phosphorylation of the retinoblastoma protein (Rb) in early G1. This prevents G1/S phase transition, causes cell cycle arrest in the G1 phase, induces apoptosis, and inhibits the proliferation of CDK4/6-overexpressing tumor cells. In patients with CDK4/6-independent tumor cells, G1T28 may protect against multi-lineage chemotherapy-induced myelosuppression (CIM) by transiently and reversibly inducing G1 cell cycle arrest in hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSPCs) and preventing transition to the S phase. This protects all hematopoietic lineages, including red blood cells, platelets, neutrophils and lymphocytes, from the DNA-damaging effects of certain chemotherapeutics and preserves the function of the bone marrow and the immune system. CDKs are serine/threonine kinases involved in the regulation of the cell cycle and may be overexpressed in certain cancer cell types. HSPCs are dependent upon CDK4/6 for proliferation.

A semisynthetic derivative of camptothecin, a cytotoxic, quinoline-based alkaloid extracted from the Asian tree Camptotheca acuminata. Topotecan inhibits topoisomerase I activity by stabilizing the topoisomerase I-DNA covalent complexes during S phase of cell cycle, thereby inhibiting religation of topoisomerase I-mediated single-strand DNA breaks and producing potentially lethal double-strand DNA breaks when encountered by the DNA replication machinery.

A small molecule inhibitor of the tyrosine kinase WEE1 with potential antineoplastic sensitizing activity. Adavosertib selectively targets and inhibits WEE1, a tyrosine kinase that phosphorylates cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1, CDC2) to inactivate the CDC2/cyclin B complex. Inhibition of WEE1 activity prevents the phosphorylation of CDC2 and impairs the G2 DNA damage checkpoint. This may lead to apoptosis upon treatment with DNA damaging chemotherapeutic agents. Unlike normal cells, most p53 deficient or mutated human cancers lack the G1 checkpoint as p53 is the key regulator of the G1 checkpoint and these cells rely on the G2 checkpoint for DNA repair to damaged cells. Annulment of the G2 checkpoint may therefore make p53 deficient tumor cells more vulnerable to antineoplastic agents and enhance their cytotoxic effect.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Carboplatin is an organoplatinum antineoplastic alkylating agent used in the treatment of advanced ovarian carcinoma.Early clinical studies of carboplatin were performed in 1982. Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

Tozasertib (VX-680, MK-0457) is a pan-Aurora inhibitor, mostly against Aurora A with Kiapp of 0.6 nM in a cell-free assay, less potent towards Aurora B/Aurora C and 100-fold more selective for Aurora A than 55 other kinases. The only exceptions are Fms-related tyrosine kinase-3 (FLT-3) and BCR-ABL tyrosine kinase, which are inhibited by the Tozasertib with both Ki of 30 nM. Tozasertib induces apoptosis and autophagy.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伏立诺他可通过nM级别的浓度（IC50＜86nM）抑制I型组蛋白去乙酰酶IHDAC1/HDAC2/HDAC3和II型的HDAC6的酶活。这些酶能够去除包括组蛋白和转录因子等蛋白中赖氨酸残疾上的乙酰基团。在一些肿瘤中，过表达HDAC或招募至转录因子的HDAC水平异常可导致核小体组蛋白低乙酰化，组蛋白低乙酰化与染色质结构压缩和基因转录受抑制相关。抑制HDAC活性可使乙酰基团在组蛋白赖氨酸残基中积累以便有开放的染色质结构和正常的转录活性。在体外实验中，伏立诺地证实可导致一些转化细胞中的乙酰化的组蛋白积累并诱导细胞周期阻滞和/或凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic hydroxamic acid derivative with antineoplastic activity. Vorinostat, a second generation polar-planar compound, binds to the catalytic domain of the histone deacetylases (HDACs). This allows the hydroxamic moiety to chelate zinc ion located in the catalytic pockets of HDAC, thereby inhibiting deacetylation and leading to an accumulation of both hyperacetylated histones and transcription factors. Hyperacetylation of histone proteins results in the upregulation of the cyclin-dependant kinase p21, followed by G1 arrest. Hyperacetylation of non-histone proteins such as tumor suppressor p53, alpha tubulin, and heat-shock protein 90 produces additional anti-proliferative effects. This agent also induces apoptosis and sensitizes tumor cells to cell death processes. Vorinostat crosses the blood-brain barrier.

Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

A small molecule inhibitor of the tyrosine kinase WEE1 with potential antineoplastic sensitizing activity. Adavosertib selectively targets and inhibits WEE1, a tyrosine kinase that phosphorylates cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1, CDC2) to inactivate the CDC2/cyclin B complex. Inhibition of WEE1 activity prevents the phosphorylation of CDC2 and impairs the G2 DNA damage checkpoint. This may lead to apoptosis upon treatment with DNA damaging chemotherapeutic agents. Unlike normal cells, most p53 deficient or mutated human cancers lack the G1 checkpoint as p53 is the key regulator of the G1 checkpoint and these cells rely on the G2 checkpoint for DNA repair to damaged cells. Annulment of the G2 checkpoint may therefore make p53 deficient tumor cells more vulnerable to antineoplastic agents and enhance their cytotoxic effect.

A second-generation, orally bioavailable, highly selective small molecule inhibitor of the serine/threonine protein kinase Aurora A kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Alisertib binds to and inhibits Aurora A kinase, which may result in disruption of the assembly of the mitotic spindle apparatus, disruption of chromosome segregation, and inhibition of cell proliferation. Aurora A kinase localizes to the spindle poles and to spindle microtubules during mitosis, and is thought to regulate spindle assembly. Aberrant expression of Aurora kinases occurs in a wide variety of cancers, including colon and breast cancers.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential antineoplastic activity. Talazoparib selectively binds to PARP and prevents PARP-mediated DNA repair of single strand DNA breaks via the base-excision repair pathway. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and eventually leads to apoptosis. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins that signal and recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA and is activated by single-strand DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Pazopanib（帕唑帕尼）是一种多酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2，VEGFR-3，血小板衍生生长因子受体（PDGFR）-α和-β，成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR） -1和-3，细胞因子受体（Kit），白介素2受体诱导的T细胞激酶（Itk），淋巴细胞特异性蛋白酪氨酸激酶（Lck）和跨膜糖蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（c-Fms）。 在体外，Pazopanib抑制配体诱导的VEGFR-2，Kit和PDGFR-β受体的自磷酸化。 在体内，Pazopanib抑制小鼠肺中VEGF诱导的VEGFR-2磷酸化，小鼠模型中的血管生成以及小鼠中某些人肿瘤异种移植物的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of multiple protein tyrosine kinases with potential antineoplastic activity. Pazopanib selectively inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptors (VEGFR)-1, -2 and -3, c-kit and platelet derived growth factor receptor (PDGF-R), which may result in inhibition of angiogenesis in tumors in which these receptors are upregulated.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伏立诺他可通过nM级别的浓度（IC50＜86nM）抑制I型组蛋白去乙酰酶IHDAC1/HDAC2/HDAC3和II型的HDAC6的酶活。这些酶能够去除包括组蛋白和转录因子等蛋白中赖氨酸残疾上的乙酰基团。在一些肿瘤中，过表达HDAC或招募至转录因子的HDAC水平异常可导致核小体组蛋白低乙酰化，组蛋白低乙酰化与染色质结构压缩和基因转录受抑制相关。抑制HDAC活性可使乙酰基团在组蛋白赖氨酸残基中积累以便有开放的染色质结构和正常的转录活性。在体外实验中，伏立诺地证实可导致一些转化细胞中的乙酰化的组蛋白积累并诱导细胞周期阻滞和/或凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic hydroxamic acid derivative with antineoplastic activity. Vorinostat, a second generation polar-planar compound, binds to the catalytic domain of the histone deacetylases (HDACs). This allows the hydroxamic moiety to chelate zinc ion located in the catalytic pockets of HDAC, thereby inhibiting deacetylation and leading to an accumulation of both hyperacetylated histones and transcription factors. Hyperacetylation of histone proteins results in the upregulation of the cyclin-dependant kinase p21, followed by G1 arrest. Hyperacetylation of non-histone proteins such as tumor suppressor p53, alpha tubulin, and heat-shock protein 90 produces additional anti-proliferative effects. This agent also induces apoptosis and sensitizes tumor cells to cell death processes. Vorinostat crosses the blood-brain barrier.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 根据TCGA数据库记录，AURKA扩增在结直肠腺癌​、浆液性卵巢囊腺癌、浸润性乳腺癌、食管腺癌、​子宫肉瘤​等肿瘤中有2%以上的发生率。有研究表明（PMID: 29675108），AURKA基因拷贝数增加是肢端黑色素瘤患者的不良预后因素；另有研究表明（PMID: 20585902），AURKA基因拷贝数增加与胃癌患者的肿瘤进展及mRNA过表达呈正相关性。OncoKB数据库记录AURKA基因扩增为Oncogenic。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: According to The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) records, AURKA amplification has an occurrence rate of over 2% in tumors such as colorectal adenocarcinoma, serous ovarian cystadenocarcinoma, invasive breast carcinoma, esophageal adenocarcinoma, and uterine carcinosarcoma. Some studies have shown (PMID: 29675108) that AURKA gene copy number increase is a poor prognostic factor for patients with acral melanoma. Another study (PMID: 20585902) showed that AURKA gene copy number increase was positively correlated with tumor progression and mRNA overexpression in gastric cancer patients. The OncoKB database records AURKA gene amplification as Oncogenic.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 22825030），携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌移植瘤小鼠模型对Tozasertib(MK-0547)±伏立诺他治疗敏感，可抑制肿瘤生长，其中联合治疗方案可显著提高小鼠存活率。细胞实验中，与野生型相比较，携带AURKA基因扩增的乳腺癌细胞对Alisertib(MLN8237)更敏感，可促进细胞凋亡。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: My Cancer Genome数据库记录，约0.11%的患者存在NTRK3基因扩增，其中以乳腺浸润性导管癌、浸润性乳腺癌、皮肤黑色素瘤、卵巢高级别浆液性腺癌和肢端黑色素瘤最为常见。有文献报道（PMID: 28746220），NTRK3基因拷贝数变异与铂敏感和铂耐药复发相关，NTRK3基因扩增可预测卵巢癌患者的铂敏感性复发。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The My Cancer Genome database records that approximately 0.11% of patients have NTRK3 gene amplification, among which invasive ductal carcinoma of the breast, invasive breast cancer, cutaneous melanoma, high-grade serous adenocarcinoma of the ovary, and acrofacial melanoma are the most common. It has been reported in the literature (PMID: 28746220) that copy number variations of the NTRK3 gene are associated with platinum sensitivity and platinum-resistant recurrence, and NTRK3 gene amplification can predict platinum-sensitive recurrence in patients with ovarian cancer.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 有研究发现（PMID: 28316110），乳腺癌中有PSMD4扩增和过表达，且其过表达与预后较差相关；敲减PSMD4导致细胞生长显著降低；在PSMD4扩增乳腺癌细胞系中敲减PSMD4或PSMD4扩增丢失可导致PAPR1蛋白敲减，PSMD4拷贝数增加或扩增的乳腺癌细胞系对他拉唑帕利的敏感性显著更高，提示其可能可以预测PARP抑制剂的敏感性。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项细胞实验中（PMID: 28316110），相比于拷贝数没有改变的细胞系，PSMD4拷贝数增加/扩增的乳腺癌细胞系对他拉唑帕利敏感性显著更高。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: My Cancer Genome数据库记录，约0.50%的患者存在IGF1R基因扩增，其中以乳腺浸润性导管癌、浸润性乳腺癌、皮肤黑色素瘤、卵巢高级别浆液性腺癌及肺腺癌最为常见。有研究表明（PMID: 28382840），IGF1R基因扩增与胸膜肺母细胞瘤实质病变有关，可能是肿瘤进展的晚期事件。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The My Cancer Genome database records that approximately 0.50% of patients have IGF1R gene amplification, among which invasive ductal carcinoma of the breast, invasive breast cancer, cutaneous melanoma, high-grade serous adenocarcinoma of the ovary, and lung adenocarcinoma are the most common. Studies have shown (PMID: 28382840) that the amplification of the IGF1R gene is related to the parenchymal lesion of pleuropulmonary blastoma and may be a late event of tumor progression.

p_var.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。
p_var.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能造成异常剪接。该变异在ExAC数据库人群等位基因频率为0.000008278（1/120806），1000G、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=126832）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为两颗星），体系突变分类为Oncogenic（可靠度为一颗星）。在2例视网膜母细胞瘤患者中报道该变异（PMID: 27582626, PMID: 26396485）。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: This variant may cause abnormal splicing. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.000008278(1/120806) in the ExAC database, with no record in the 1000G, gnomAD or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=126832) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: two stars) and Oncogenic in somatic classification (review status: one star).This variant has been reported in two patients with retinoblastoma (PMID: 27582626, PMID: 26396485).
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为经典剪接位点突变。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the canonical splice sites of the gene.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心II期临床试验（NCT02038647, PMID: 31655296），旨在评估Alisertib（MLN8237）联合紫杉醇与安慰剂联合紫杉醇用于二线治疗小细胞肺癌（SCLC）的疗效及安全性。研究发现，在140例携带基因变异的患者中，携带细胞周期调节相关的基因（CDK6、RBL1、RBL2、RB1）变异的患者使用Alisertib+紫杉醇治疗对比使用安慰剂+紫杉醇治疗的患者中位PFS分别为3.68个月、1.80个月（HR=0.395, 95% CI: 0.239–0.654），中位OS分别为7.20个月、4.47个月（HR=0.427, 95% CI: 0.259–0.704）。此外，c-Myc蛋白表达患者的亚组分析显示，共有46个肿瘤组织样本通过免疫组织化学分析可评估c-Myc表达，33例（72%）c-Myc表达阳性(IHC：1+、2+或3+)，13例（28%）c-Myc表达阴性。在c-Myc阳性患者中，Alisertib+紫杉醇组（n=17）的中位PFS为4.64个月，而安慰剂+紫杉醇组（n=16）的中位PFS为2.27个月（HR=0.29, 95% CI: 0.12-0.72）。在c-Myc阴性患者中，Alisertib+紫杉醇组（n=6）的中位PFS为3.32个月，而安慰剂+紫杉醇组（n=7）的中位PFS为5.16个月(HR=11.8, 95% CI: 1.52-91.2)。研究结果显示，c-Myc表达与PFS的改善密切相关。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 26826116），RB1缺陷的小细胞肺癌的小鼠移植瘤模型，对CDK4/6抑制剂Trilaciclib（G1T28）单药处理耐药，拓扑替康可强力抑制移植瘤的生长，而与Trilaciclib联用可显著增强这一抑制作用。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomAD数据库非始祖效应人群中无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=233908）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为两颗星）。Cancer Hotspots数据库无记录。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. This variant is not recorded in the gnomAD database in non-founder effect populations; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=233908) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: two stars). The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第301位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺并于344位发生终止。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Proline with Glutamine at position 301 and causes termination of the protein at codon 344.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项II期、开放标签、非随机研究（NCT01164995, PMID: 37236033），入组32名中位年龄为63岁（39–77岁）的TP53突变PROC（抗铂性卵巢癌）患者，使用卡铂AUC 5 mg/ml·min静脉注射和阿达沃司替布（Adavosertib）225 mg BID口服，为期2.5天，周期21天；主要目的是确定卡铂和阿达沃司替布的疗效和安全性。次要目标包括无进展生存期（PFS）、循环肿瘤细胞（CTC）变化等。研究结果显示，在29名可疗效评估的患者中，12名患者部分缓解（PR），客观ORR为41%（95% CI:23%-61%），中位PFS为5.6个月（95% CI:3.8-10.3）。研究认为：阿达沃司替布225 mg BID 2.5天和卡铂AUC 5联合使用是安全的，并在PROC患者中显示出抗肿瘤疗效。

一项多中心II期临床试验（NCT01357161, PMID: 32611648），试验分为2个部分，第一部分为开放标签的安全性试验，第二部分为随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的临床试验；总共入组121位TP53突变的铂敏感的卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者，分别使用Adavosertib(AZD1775)+卡铂+紫杉醇或安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇治疗。主要研究终点为ePFS（RECIST v1.1加强版评估的PFS）和安全性。研究结果：PFS对比中，Adavosertib+卡铂+紫杉醇 vs 安慰剂+卡铂+紫杉醇为7.9个月 vs 7.3个月（HR 0.63[95% CI 0.38-1.06];two-side P=0.080），满足预设的显著性阈值（P＜0.2）。

一项II期临床试验（NCT03588078, PMID: 33600210），入组52例携带TP53突变的患者，包括34例骨髓异常增长综合征患者（MDS）、18例急性髓系白血病患者（AML，包括7名骨髓母细胞超过30%的患者），使用APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷进行治疗；主要终点为缓解率，次要终点为安全性、总生存期等参数。研究结果显示，MDS患者的总体缓解率为62%，包括47%的完全缓解率，中位缓解持续时间为10.4个月；AML患者的总体缓解率为33%，包括17%的完全缓解率（在骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的急性髓系白血病中，总缓解率分别为27%、0%）。中位随访时间为9.7个月，MDS的中位OS为12.1个月，骨髓母细胞小于和大于30%的AML的中位OS分别为13.9和3.0个月。研究结论为：在极高危TP53m MDS和AML患者群体中，APR-246（Eprenetapopt）联合阿扎胞苷是安全的，并显示出比单独使用阿扎胞苷更高的缓解率，以及更长的总生存期。

一项I期临床试验（NCT01339871, PMID: 25669829），旨在探究培唑帕尼（Pazopanib）联合伏立诺他（Vorinostat）在晚期实体瘤患者中的最高耐受剂量和安全性。共纳入78例患者（肉瘤：n=23，结直肠癌：n=14，黑色素瘤：n=7，卵巢癌：n=5，肾细胞癌：n=4；肝癌：n=3，非小细胞肺癌：n=3，其他：n=19），接受11个剂量水平的联合治疗，结果表明：15例（19%）患者具有临床获益（PR：n=4，SD≥6个月：n=11），78例患者的中位PFS和中位OS分别为2.2个月、8.9个月；使用Cox回归模型确定临床获益的多变量分析中显示TP53突变状态与临床获益有关，36例患者接受了TP53突变检测，与TP53野生型的患者（n=25）相比，TP53突变型患者（n=11）的临床获益率更高（45% vs 16%）、中位PFS更长（3.5个月 vs 2.0个月）、中位OS更长（12.7个月 vs 7.4个月），从联合治疗中获益的TP53突变型患者为：携带TP53 R213*、G245S的结直肠癌患者，携带TP53 R175H、DBDdel、H193R的肉瘤患者。所有患者中未出现与治疗相关的死亡事件，推荐的II期剂量为培唑帕尼（600 mg/天）联合伏立诺他（300 mg/天）。

一项I期、开放标签、非随机三组剂量递增的临床试验中（NCT00648648，PMID: 27601554），入组202名晚期实体瘤患者，组1（n=9）先接受单剂量Adavosertib/AZD1775（观察14天，8人加入组2A），组2接受单剂量Adavosertib（组2A，n=43）或每日两次五倍剂量/每日一次双倍剂量（组2B，n=158）联合一种化疗（吉西他滨、顺铂或卡铂）。研究结果显示，在176名可评估疗效的患者中，94名（53%）患者病情稳定，17名（10%）患者达到部分缓解；TP53突变患者（n=19）中4名达到部分缓解（PR），应答率为21%，而TP53野生型患者（n=33）为12%。研究结论为，Adavosertib单剂联合化疗安全、耐受性好；TP53突变患者的应答率更高一些，但仍需扩大样本量进一步评估。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the ClinVar database has no record about this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第739位氨基酸由酪氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 739th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Tyrosine to Aspartic acid.
